form.formComment: Second-up today. Last run held ground to the line finished second of 7 runners at this track on March 14 over 3600m, on a wet track; 5 len behind Theleme with 70kg at $7.80. At only start last preparation finished fourth of 7 runners at this track in the G2 on March 23 2025 over 3900m, 7 len behind Square Saint Roch carrying 64kg at $10. Fitter and will be tough to beat.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. First-up after four months won by 1.75 len Compiegne on March 23 over 3800m slow going defeating Sorceleur with 66kg at $7.90 in a hurdle. Previously second-up fell at this track on October 7 over 3500m. Will strip fitter and makes plenty of appeal.

form.formComment: Second-up today. First-up after four months finished 12th of 15 runners at Compiegne on March 23 over 3900m, on slow going 28 len behind Priam Du Mesnil with 69.5kg at $31. form.formComment: Freshened for 35 days. Last outing rolled along in front setting the pace and then edged out finished second of 10 runners at Fontainebleau on March 9 over 3800m, on slow going 2 len behind Inner Success carrying 69kg at $9.50. Run before finished fifth of 10 runners at Taunton on January 8 over 3822m, 27 len behind Brave Knight carrying 65.5kg at $4.30. Impressed last start. Rates a key chance and expected to feature.

form.formComment: Recent form hard to fault. Freshened for 30 days. Last outing finished third of 7 runners at this track in the LR on March 14 over 4400m, on rain affected going; 13 len behind Lauthentyko carrying 67kg at $2.50. Start to post a big 7 len win. Pau on February 8 over 4700m on heavy going defeating Un Chic Cheval with 69kg at $1.90 in a steeplechase. Found his best form now. Winning chance.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. Resuming finished second of 11 starters at Angers on February 12 over 4100m, 3 len behind Caligramme with 68kg at $5.30. form.formComment: Resuming after six months. Finished off last campaign 9 of 13 runners at this track October 12 over 3700m, slow track; 63 len behind File Au Poteau carrying 71kg at $11. Previously first up; didn't finish the race at this track in the LR September 23 over 4400m. May need more.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. Not raced for 49 days. Fresh up after four months finished fourth of 8 runners at this track on February 23 over 3600m, on rain affected going; 22 len behind Magnifico Conti carrying 69kg at $16. Previously second-up ran last at Nantes on November 12 over 2400m, 9 len behind Lets Danse Doudou carrying 64kg at $36. Looks tested in this line-up without further improvement.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. First-up after about 18 months pulled up at this track on March 14 over 3600m. Previously second-up won by 1.3 len this track on October 13 2024 over 3500m on heavy going defeating Laytown with 70kg at $3.20 in a hurdle. Likely to make amends for the last start mishap.
